content.text:
{
  "family": "patch_run_recover",
  "case_id": "rank_participants_multi_tiebreak_recover",
  "bug_category": "sorting_ranking_tiebreaks",
  "difficulty": "hard",
  "user": "In the Rust crate at {project_root}, fix the ranking logic in src/main.rs so running the program prints the correct leaderboard. The sort must rank by solved descending, then penalty ascending, then last accepted time ascending, and finally name ascending for any remaining ties. Keep the compact reporting format already used.",
  "expected_tool_sequence": [
    "read_file",
    "apply_patch",
    "cargo_run",
    "read_file",
    "apply_patch",
    "cargo_run"
  ],
  "expected_output": "1. Bob | solved=5 penalty=520 last=110
2. Cara | solved=5 penalty=520 last=110
3. Ada | solved=5 penalty=520 last=120
4. Eve | solved=5 penalty=640 last=95
5. Dan | solved=4 penalty=410 last=80",
  "files": {
    "Cargo.toml": "[package]
name = "rank_participants_multi_tiebreak_recover"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

[dependencies]
",
    "src/main.rs": "struct Entry {
    name: &'static str,
    solved: u32,
    penalty: u32,
    last_ac: u32,
}

fn main() {
    let mut entries = vec![
        Entry { name: "Ada", solved: 5, penalty: 520, last_ac: 120 },
        Entry { name: "Bob", solved: 5, penalty: 520, last_ac: 110 },
        Entry { name: "Cara", solved: 5, penalty: 520, last_ac: 110 },
        Entry { name: "Dan", solved: 4, penalty: 410, last_ac: 80 },
        Entry { name: "Eve", solved: 5, penalty: 640, last_ac: 95 },
    ];

    entries.sort_by(|a, b| {
        b.solved
            .cmp(&a.solved)
            .then(b.penalty.cmp(&a.penalty))
            .then(b.last_ac.cmp(&a.last_ac))
    });

    for (idx, e) in entries.iter().enumerate() {
        println!(
            "{}. {} | solved={} penalty={} last={}",
            idx + 1,
            e.name,
            e.solved,
            e.penalty,
            e.last_ac
        );
    }
}
"
  },
  "steps": [
    {
      "tool": "read_file",
      "file_path": "src/main.rs"
    },
    {
      "tool": "apply_patch",
      "file_path": "src/main.rs",
      "find": "        b.solved
            .cmp(&a.solved)
            .then(b.penalty.cmp(&a.penalty))
            .then(b.last_ac.cmp(&a.last_ac))
",
      "replace": "        b.solved
            .cmp(&a.solved)
            .then(a.penalty.cmp(&b.penalty))
            .then(b.last_ac.cmp(&a.last_ac))
"
    },
    {
      "tool": "cargo_run",
      "expect_status": "failed"
    },
    {
      "tool": "read_file",
      "file_path": "src/main.rs"
    },
    {
      "tool": "apply_patch",
      "file_path": "src/main.rs",
      "find": "        b.solved
            .cmp(&a.solved)
            .then(a.penalty.cmp(&b.penalty))
            .then(b.last_ac.cmp(&a.last_ac))
",
      "replace": "        b.solved
            .cmp(&a.solved)
            .then(a.penalty.cmp(&b.penalty))
            .then(a.last_ac.cmp(&b.last_ac))
            .then(a.name.cmp(&b.name))
"
    },
    {
      "tool": "cargo_run",
      "expect_status": "success"
    }
  ],
  "final": "FINAL: Updated the leaderboard sort to use the required tie-break order: solved descending, penalty ascending, last accepted ascending, then name ascending."
}
